case_title: ADRIAN CRUZ VS. JESUS SANTOS PATINO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-15-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-15-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF ADRIAN CRUZ AND DEFENDANT JESUS SANTOS PATINO. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-15-2017 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $65.00 SERVED AUG-03-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PATINO, JESUS SANTOS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY CRUZ, ADRIAN AS TO DEFENDANT PATINO, JESUS SANTOS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-15-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CRUZ, ADRIAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PATINO, JESUS SANTOS PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM WAS ADJUDICATED IN CSM-16-853915. PLAINTIFF IS NOT ENTITLED TO THE EXPENSES HE CLAIMS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
